summary: Multi-Country Partner Routing Pack testing completed - 40/40 backend tests passed (100%). All 4 frontend pages (Partners, Partner Catalog, Country Pricing, Routing Rules) render correctly with functional forms and proper data display.

geography_api.notes: Geography data seeded correctly with 6 countries (TZ, KE, UG, RW, BI, CD) and their regions. Countries have currency info.

partners_crud.notes: Full CRUD operations working. Create returns proper structure with id. Update correctly persists changes. Delete is soft-delete (sets status to inactive). Filtering by country_code works.

partner_catalog_crud.notes: Full CRUD operations working. Validates partner_id exists before creating catalog item. Supports filtering by partner_id, country_code, category. Delete is soft-delete (sets is_active to false).

country_pricing_rules.notes: Create/update uses upsert pattern (same country+category updates existing). Supports percentage and fixed markup types. Validates country_code is required. Hard delete (not soft delete).

routing_rules.notes: Full CRUD operations working. Supports priority modes: lead_time, margin, cost, preferred_partner. Optional region/category filters. Hard delete (not soft delete).

test_routing_endpoint.notes: Validates SKU is required (returns 400). Returns no_partner status for non-existent SKUs. Routes to partners based on country/region/category with pricing calculation.

partners_page.notes: Page renders with data-testid='partners-page'. Add Partner button opens form with all fields (name, partner_type, contact, email, phone, country, regions, coverage_mode, fulfillment_type, lead_time, settlement_terms, address, notes). Partner cards show status badges, country, lead time, fulfillment type.

partner_catalog_page.notes: Page renders with data-testid='partner-catalog-page'. Add Catalog Item button opens form. Catalog cards show SKU, partner name, price, quantity, status badges (in_stock, low_stock), category, lead time.

country_pricing_page.notes: Page renders with data-testid='country-pricing-page'. Add Pricing Rule button opens form with country select, category, markup type (percentage/fixed), markup value, currency, tax rate. Rule cards show country name, category, markup percentage/fixed, currency.

routing_rules_page.notes: Page renders with data-testid='routing-rules-page'. Add Routing Rule button opens form with country, region (optional), category (optional), priority mode dropdown, checkboxes for internal_first and fallback_allowed. Rule cards show country, priority mode badge, flags for Internal First and Fallback OK.

sidebar_navigation.feature: Partner Ecosystem navigation group in sidebar
sidebar_navigation.notes: Navigation group 'Partner Ecosystem' configured in AdminLayout.js with 4 items: Partners, Partner Catalog, Country Pricing, Routing Rules. All with moduleKey='partners' for role-based filtering.

critical_code_review_comments: geography_routes.py: Clean implementation with seed endpoint for default countries, proper serialization excluding MongoDB _id
partner_routes.py: Full CRUD with soft-delete pattern, proper filtering by country_code and status
partner_catalog_routes.py: Validates partner exists before creating catalog item, inherits partner country/regions if not specified
country_pricing_routes.py: Smart upsert pattern for same country+category combinations, supports percentage and fixed markup
routing_rules_routes.py: Supports 4 priority modes (lead_time, margin, cost, preferred_partner) with cascading rule lookup
partner_routing_service.py: Core routing engine with cascading rule lookup (specific → country-level → generic), proper price calculation with markup and tax
fulfillment_allocation_service.py: Creates hidden fulfillment jobs stripping customer personal data for partner privacy
Frontend pages: All have proper data-testid attributes for testing, clean form validation, responsive grid layouts

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All 4 Partner Ecosystem pages load and function correctly)

seed_data_creation: Geography data seeded with 6 countries and regions. Test data prefixed with 'TEST_' was created and cleaned up during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multi-Country Partner Routing Pack fully tested and working. Backend endpoints for geography (countries/regions), partners CRUD, partner catalog CRUD, country pricing rules, routing rules, and test routing endpoint all return correct data with proper validation. Frontend pages at /admin/partners, /admin/partner-catalog, /admin/country-pricing, /admin/routing-rules all load correctly with proper data-testid attributes. Partner Ecosystem navigation group configured in sidebar with 4 navigation items. The routing engine in partner_routing_service.py calculates customer prices by applying country/category markup to partner base prices, with fallback to default rules. Fulfillment allocation service creates hidden jobs for partner orders without exposing customer personal data.
